fixes.origin:
query_text = f"SELECT sku, title FROM catalog_items ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT {limit} OFFSET {offset}"
rows = cur.execute(query_text).fetchall()
fixes.replacement:
query_text = "SELECT sku, title FROM catalog_items ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?"
rows = cur.execute(query_text, (int(limit), int(offset))).fetchall()

static_findings.message: Possible SQL injection: SQL query variable "query_text" appears to be built unsafely before execution.
static_findings.evidence: query_text = f"SELECT sku, title FROM catalog_items ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT {limit} OFFSET {offset}"
